page_content:
ENSP305 Applied Spatial Analysis in Environmental Science and Policy (3 Credits)

Intended for students interested in pursuing career or graduate

research opportunities that will include identifying/querying/processing environmental datasets, detailed spatial analysis of environmental data, and applications of predictive environmental modeling. Students will learn necessary skills to analyze and process environmental data through hands-on training in commonly used software and a series of topical case studies. Data analysis and data processing will be taught using publicly available real-world environmental data sets.
